Free Quote

The Driveway Doctor

Professional driveway and patio deep cleaning services in Chichester & Surrounding Areas. Restoring surfaces to look like new.

Free Online Quote
Why Choose Us

Professional, Reliable Jet Washing

We deliver professional jet washing that restores your surfaces to look like new — with top quality equipment, competitive pricing, and a friendly local team.

Reduce Slips

Bringing surfaces back to their original condition removes moss, algae and grime that cause slipping hazards.

Increase Drive Longevity

Removing weeds that cause paving to move and resanding afterwards to maintain structure.

Increase Property Value

Restoring your drive to look as good as new boosts your home's kerb appeal and market value.

Enhance Appearance

Your driveway is the first thing visitors see — make it look its absolute best.

What We Offer

Our Services

Jet Wash

High-pressure cleaning that removes surface dirt and loose moss from driveways and patios. Ideal as a maintenance clean to freshen up your outdoor surfaces.

From £3 per m² + labour fee

Jet Wash & Chemical Treatment

Recommended

Sodium hypochlorite treatment kills spores, lichen, black & white spot and prevents regrowth for 6–12 months. Followed by a thorough jet wash for a deep clean your driveway or patio.

From £4 per m² + labour fee

Jet Wash, Chemical Treatment & Resanding

Our most complete package. Chemical treatment, full jet wash, then a 'like new' finish using premium kiln-dried sand to re-fill and stabilise joints — restoring your driveway or patio to its best ever condition.

From £5 per m² + labour fee

What Our Customers Say

Reviews

★★★★★
Sue  Selsey

I'd been wanting to get my driveway replaced for a few months, but couldn't justify the price, and was advised by a friend to just get it cleaned instead. They recommended The Driveway Doctor, so I got in touch. They got back to me next day with a quote, in which I was happy to proceed with their very reasonable pricing. The boys arrived with their gear and got straight to work, very friendly and talkative. When I went to see the results, WOW! I thought they had replaced the entire drive in under a day! If your in need of a new driveway/clean, do not hesitate. These boys are the best at what they do.

★★★★★
Andy  Selsey

The lads at The Driveway Doctor were superb. They completely transformed my patio which hadn't been cleaned in almost 10 years, making it look brand new. They used top quality chemicals removing all the moss and black spots which just would not budge when I tried myself. Very reasonable pricing, I couldn't recommend more.

★★★★★
Emma  Selsey

I heard from a friend about The Driveway Doctor, and needed my dad's driveway doing up, so gave them a shot — and oh boy they didn't disappoint. They were very friendly, and explained the entire process to my dad (who was a bit concerned at first putting chemicals on a 20 year old driveway) and brought the drive back to brand new.

★★★★★
Tommy  Selsey

The boys did a great job, got rid of all the algae and everything else. Driveway looks spotless. Would also recommend the sanding package highly. Can't complain with the pricing with what your getting honestly. 5 stars from me.
